inputs.label: Destination
inputs.businessContext: Travel cost varies significantly by destination type. Based on industry travel expense benchmarks (e.g., IRS per diem rates).

inputs.label: Trip Duration (days)
inputs.businessContext: Standard trip length; affects accommodation, meals, and incidentals. Based on typical business travel durations.

inputs.label: Number of Travelers
inputs.businessContext: Group size impacts total cost; economies of scale may apply. Standard input for group travel budgeting.

inputs.label: Accommodation Cost per Night
inputs.businessContext: Hotel or lodging cost per night. Based on average corporate hotel rates (e.g., from travel management companies).

inputs.label: Daily Meal Cost per Person
inputs.businessContext: Per diem meal allowance. Common corporate travel policy (e.g., GSA per diem rates).

inputs.label: Total Transportation Cost
inputs.businessContext: Includes flights, trains, taxis, car rental. Based on typical travel expenses.

inputs.label: Daily Incidentals per Person
inputs.businessContext: Miscellaneous expenses (tips, snacks, etc.). Standard travel budgeting practice.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: Currency for cost display. Supports major currencies for international trips.

inputs.label: Exchange Rate (to USD)
inputs.businessContext: Used when currency is not USD. Based on current market rates (e.g., OANDA).

inputs.label: Data Confidence (%)
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted output. Common in risk analysis.

rules: If destination is 'international', exchangeRate must be provided and not equal to 1 unless currency is USD

thresholds.totalCostPerPerson: If totalCostPerPerson > 5000, warning: 'High cost per person, consider budget review'
thresholds.accommodationCostPerNight: If accommodationCostPerNight > 500, warning: 'Accommodation cost exceeds typical corporate limit'

hiddenLossDrivers: If totalCostPerPerson > 5000: 'Total cost per person exceeds budget threshold'
suggestedActions: Consider using corporate discounts for accommodation
Optimize meal plan with per diem limits
Book transportation in advance for lower rates
Review incidentals and reduce if possible
